title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley’s Hound Dog to Beyoncé’s Say My Name , and Harry Styles’ As It…
